# st-alicloud_ecd_desktop (Resource)

Provides a Alicloud ECD Desktop resource. Creates a virtual desktop inside a Simple Office Site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "st-alicloud_ecd_desktop" "test" {
  office_site_id  = "test"
  bundle_id       = "test"
  policy_group_id = "test"
  desktop_name    = "test-desktop"
  payment_type    = "PayAsYouGo"
  vswitch_id      = "vsw-test"

  tags = {
    Brand = "a"
    Env   = "test"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bundle_id` (String) The ID of the desktop bundle (defines OS image and hardware spec).
- `office_site_id` (String) The ID of the Simple Office Site in which to create the desktop.
- `policy_group_id` (String) The ID of the desktop policy to apply.

### Optional

- `auto_pay` (Boolean) Whether to enable automatic payment for Subscription desktops.
- `auto_renew` (Boolean) Whether to enable automatic renewal for Subscription desktops.
- `desktop_name` (String) The name of the desktop.
- `end_user_ids` (List of String) The IDs of the end users to assign to the desktop.
- `host_name` (String) The hostname of the desktop. Valid only for AD (Enterprise) office networks with Windows desktops. Do not set this for Simple Office Sites.
- `payment_type` (String) The billing method of the desktop. Valid values: PayAsYouGo, Subscription.
- `period` (Number) The subscription duration. Used when payment_type is Subscription.
- `period_unit` (String) The unit of the subscription duration. Valid values: Month, Year.
- `stopped_mode` (String) The stopped mode of the desktop. Valid values: StopCharging, KeepCharging. Applied when the desktop is stopped.
- `tags` (Map of String) A map of tags to assign to the desktop.
- `user_assign_mode` (String) The user assignment mode. Valid values: ALL, PER_USER.
- `vswitch_id` (String) The ID of the VSwitch in which to deploy the desktop. Not required for Simple Office Sites.

### Read-Only

- `desktop_type` (String) The type of the desktop. Determined by the bundle.
- `id` (String) The ID of the ECD Desktop.
- `status` (String) The current status of the desktop.
